assertion_results.text: Duplicate check searches for sibling issues using JQL with the CVE label and excludes the current issue key (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md shows JQL: "project = TC AND labels = 'CVE-2026-31812' AND issuetype = 10024 AND key != TC-8003". This searches by the CVE label (CVE-2026-31812) and explicitly excludes the current issue key (key != TC-8003).

assertion_results.text: Duplicate check correctly classifies TC-7999 as a same-stream sibling (both have stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2]) and identifies it as a duplicate (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md Step 4.1 states: "TC-8003 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.2] --> stream 2.2.x" and "TC-7999 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.2] --> stream 2.2.x", concluding "Both issues have the same stream suffix ([rhtpa-2.2]), meaning they are same-stream siblings." Classification is explicitly "SAME-STREAM DUPLICATE".

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing TC-8003 as Duplicate with resolution 'Duplicate', referencing TC-7999 as the original (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states "Decision: Close as Duplicate" and "TC-8003 is a duplicate of TC-7999." Action item 2 reads: "Transition TC-8003 to Closed with resolution Duplicate." TC-7999 is explicitly referenced as the existing sibling throughout.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting why it is a duplicate — same CVE tracked for the same stream (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md Action item 1 specifies adding a comment: "Duplicate of TC-7999 -- same CVE (CVE-2026-31812) tracked for the same stream [rhtpa-2.2]. Version impact analysis confirms overlap. TC-7999 is already In Progress with Affects Versions [RHTPA 2.2.0, RHTPA 2.2.1]." This documents both the same CVE and same stream as the reason.

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT proceed to remediation task creation — duplicate detection short-circuits the triage flow
assertion_results.evidence: duplicate-check.md explicitly states "The duplicate detection in Step 4.1 short-circuits the remaining triage steps" and marks Steps 5-8 as "Not needed". triage-outcome.md confirms "Remediation Tasks: None created. The duplicate detection in Step 4.1 short-circuits the triage workflow." Steps 5-8 are all listed as "Skipped" with reason "Short-circuited by duplicate detection".
